entity.summary: Ethereum-based decentralized exchange and automated-market-maker protocol launched in March 2020. After the November 2025 Balancer v2 exploit, Balancer Labs announced its March 2026 wind-down, while protocol governance and operations continued through DAO, Foundation, and consolidated operating-company structures.
entity.notes: Retain limited rather than dead. Balancer Labs, the historical corporate contributor, is winding down, but official governance materials describe continuing protocol operations under a DAO-directed operating structure. Existing exploit and corporate-wind-down events are not duplicated. This entity represents the Balancer exchange/protocol identity, not only Balancer Labs.

expected.summary: Decentralized exchange and automated-market-maker protocol. In March 2026, Balancer Labs, the corporate entity historically associated with the protocol, announced it would wind down after the November 2025 Balancer v2 exploit, while the protocol itself was expected to continue through DAO/Foundation/OpCo structures.
expected.notes: Do not mark dead. The public record supports Balancer Labs winding down and a major exploit history, but the protocol continuation path is explicitly described in the official forum post and secondary coverage. Treat this as limited / restructuring unless later evidence shows protocol-level shutdown.

changes.summary: Ethereum-based decentralized exchange and automated-market-maker protocol launched in March 2020. After the November 2025 Balancer v2 exploit, Balancer Labs announced its March 2026 wind-down, while protocol governance and operations continued through DAO, Foundation, and consolidated operating-company structures.
changes.notes: Retain limited rather than dead. Balancer Labs, the historical corporate contributor, is winding down, but official governance materials describe continuing protocol operations under a DAO-directed operating structure. Existing exploit and corporate-wind-down events are not duplicated. This entity represents the Balancer exchange/protocol identity, not only Balancer Labs.

evidence.title: On the Future of Balancer: Shutting Down Balancer Labs, Supporting the Path Forward
evidence.notes: First-party announcement distinguishes the Balancer Labs wind-down from continued belief in and support for the protocol path forward.

evidence.title: Operational Restructuring for Balancer
evidence.notes: Official governance proposal describes consolidation under Balancer OpCo Limited and continued protocol operations after Balancer Labs winds down.

evidence.title: Balancer official protocol site
evidence.notes: Current official domain remains reachable under the Balancer protocol identity.
